conversations.content: 你是无人机飞行助手，可以根据用户需要调用工具查询飞前信息。
conversations.tools: [{"type": "function", "function": {"name": "check_no_fly_zone", "description": "查询指定地理坐标是否处于无人机禁飞区或限飞区", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"latitude": {"type": "number", "description": "纬度"}, "longitude": {"type": "number", "description": "经度"}}, "required": ["latitude", "longitude"]}}}, {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "get_weather_for_flight", "description": "获取指定位置的飞行气象条件，包括风速、能见度、降水概率", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"location": {"type": "string", "description": "位置名称或坐标"}}, "required": ["location"]}}}]

conversations.content: 我想在北京市朝阳公园附近飞无人机，帮我查一下那里是不是禁飞区，以及现在的天气适合飞吗？
你是无人机航测规划助手，可以帮用户规划航线、计算飞行参数。
conversations.tools: [{"type": "function", "function": {"name": "calculate_flight_time", "description": "根据电池容量、飞行重量和环境风速估算剩余飞行时间", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"battery_capacity_mah": {"type": "number", "description": "电池容量（mAh）"}, "battery_percentage": {"type": "number", "description": "当前电量百分比"}, "drone_weight_kg": {"type": "number", "description": "起飞重量（kg）"}, "wind_speed_ms": {"type": "number", "description": "当前风速（m/s）"}}, "required": ["battery_capacity_mah", "battery_percentage", "drone_weight_kg"]}}}, {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "plan_mission_route", "description": "根据测区范围和参数规划无人机航测航线", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"area_km2": {"type": "number", "description": "测区面积（平方公里）"}, "overlap_rate": {"type": "number", "description": "航向重叠率（0-1）", "default": 0.75}, "side_overlap_rate": {"type": "number", "description": "旁向重叠率（0-1）", "default": 0.65}, "flight_altitude_m": {"type": "number", "description": "飞行高度（米）"}, "sensor_width_mm": {"type": "number", "description": "相机传感器宽度（mm）", "default": 17.3}, "focal_length_mm": {"type": "number", "description": "镜头焦距（mm）", "default": 24}}, "required": ["area_km2", "flight_altitude_m"]}}}]

conversations.content: 我要对2平方公里的区域做正射影像航测，飞行高度120米，帮我规划一下航线，顺便算一下用5000mAh电池满电能飞多久。
你是无人机设备顾问，可以查询各型号参数、进行单位换算。
conversations.tools: [{"type": "function", "function": {"name": "get_drone_specs", "description": "查询指定无人机型号的详细技术参数", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"model": {"type": "string", "description": "无人机型号，如 DJI Mavic 3, Autel EVO II"}}, "required": ["model"]}}}, {"type": "function", "function": {"name": "convert_drone_units", "description": "无人机常用单位换算：高度（ft/m）、速度（m/s, km/h, kt）、距离（m, km, mile）", "parameters": {"type": "object", "properties": {"value": {"type": "number", "description": "待转换的数值"}, "from_unit": {"type": "string", "description": "源单位"}, "to_unit": {"type": "string", "description": "目标单位"}}, "required": ["value", "from_unit", "to_unit"]}}}]

conversations.content: 比较一下DJI Mavic 3和Autel EVO II Pro V3的最大飞行高度，单位用英尺。
